title: R1 starts up with $78M, aiming for a better kidney drug

summary: A group of researchers are launching an effort to validate big scientific claims, with help from artificial intelligence.

summary: Despite a cool reception from Congress, the White House is looking to intensify its pressure campaign on lawmakers to pass a “most-favored nation" drug pricing bill.

title: Opinion: Semaglutide is going off-patent in India. But will people who need it be able to get it?
summary: Rules determining who gets access to semaglutide in India were written for different bodies with different cardiovascular risks.

summary: After 50 years of operation, FQHCs are discovering that their financial structure has not kept pace with the realities of delivering on their mission.

title: STAT+: Asthma patients suffered as GSK pursued ‘egregious’ price hikes, senator says
summary: After GSK replaced a popular asthma inhaler with an identical product at a higher price, families reported substantial financial and treatment problems, according to a new report.

title: CytomX surges on positive data for ‘masked’ ADC in colorectal cancer
summary: Company shares spiked more than 60% after the therapy surpassed Wall Street benchmarks in Phase 1 testing against late-line colorectal tumors.

summary: Two people with paralysis were able to type using a brain-computer interface that decodes attempted finger movement, a new study showed.

summary: "Watching my mom die of ALS was one of the most awful things I’ve gone through. I don’t want my children to see me suffer like that."

title: Major changes to cardiovascular guidelines suggest taking statins as young as 30
summary: Cardiology groups say adults as young as 30 should assess cholesterol risk and consider treatment to prevent heart attacks and strokes.

summary: Evotec will cut 800 employees in its second layoff round since 2024. Elsewhere, Ultragenyx got a needed win and a twice-rejected cell therapy is getting an audience at the FDA.

title: New FDA guidance could elevate pharma’s biosimilar market
summary: Biologic copycats have had a limited impact on U.S. drug prices so far, but loosening regulatory restrictions could help accelerate their progress.

title: Lilly warns GLP-1 knockoffs may be ‘dangerous,’ escalating war with compounders
summary: Lilly asked the FDA to step in after claiming that testing it’s done suggests copycat versions of Zepbound may carry “unknown risks.”

title: FDA to unify agency’s ‘fragmented’ safety surveillance system
summary: Combining the disparate databases used to detect potential issues with drugs, vaccines and other products into a single dashboard will enhance their utility and cut costs, the agency said.
